text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ever since the Champions Cup, things between
Copano Rickey and Hokko Tarumae have been a
little awkward.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Um, excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
About what happened the other day—I think I
might have gone too far with what I said to
Rickey.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: ...I'm sorry.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She only spoke so firmly because she knows
Copano Rickey's true strength. And besides, it
sounds like she regrets taking that tone.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: So... how has Rickey been at training?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Super energetic? That must mean...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
It must really be bothering her, then. The worse
she feels, the less she shows it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hokko Tarumae's assessment is correct. Copano
Rickey is actually...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Let's go, let's go, let's gooo! ♪ This time I'm definitely going to change Tarumae's whole impression of me!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Rickey! ☆ Lucky! ☆ Super speedy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The bigger the hole in her heart, the more she
subconsciously tries to hide it with forced
enthusiasm. But the thing is...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Trainer! How was my time?!
choice_data_list: ...Not great. You weren't in proper form either.
...Not great. You weren't in proper form either.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may be able to fake her attitude, but she
can't fake a good performance.
choice_data_list: Try not to worry about it too much, Rickey.
Try not to worry about it too much, Rickey.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Don't worry? About what? I'm completely
fine...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My words won't get through to her unless she
realizes what's troubling her. At this rate...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She'll probably struggle to run well in the
February Stakes, much less secure future wins.
She's stuck in a vicious cycle that she can't see.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I want to make everyone happy... But am I
getting offtrack?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Is making everyone happy... an impossible goal?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
No, I can't think like that! The power of feng shui
is unstoppable! Nothing can beat it! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It hurts to watch her try and act like she's all right.
I need to help her get back to normal somehow...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Rickey really looks like she's having a rough time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Smart Falcon comes over.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
How did things get like this? All she wants is for
everyone to be happy.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You know... I think all of us dirt racers are a little
awkward somehow.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Some of us are too open about how we feel, and
others struggle to say what they're thinking.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But I love that about us. ☆ We're all adorable in
our own way. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I agree. It's this combination of personality
traits that can sometimes cause
misunderstandings.
choice_data_list: What do you think she should do?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I don't really know. But I think everyone
does their best when they can stay on course and
stick to whatever their goals are.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Rickey wants to make everyone happy with feng
shui! Tarumae wants to make her hometown
famous! And I...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I want my Umadol songs and dances to pump
people up! ♪ We just need to believe in ourselves
and keep working hard.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Until recently, Copano Rickey always did exactly
that, but now she's struggling to keep it up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: If we have any hope of getting through this...
choice_data_list: Smart Falcon. I have a favor to ask of you.
Smart Falcon. I have a favor to ask of you.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: A favor? What is it?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Pump Rickey up?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Each and every racer shines in their own unique
way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even when there's nothing a trainer can do, there
might be something another racer can...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you're right. And I'm the one who said
everyone needs to stick to their goals. So... ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'll do what I can! ♪ I do have a little more
experience than her, after all.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Okay, just you wait and see! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
What are we doing here, Trainer? What about
today's training?
choice_data_list:
Don't worry about it for now. Just look up at the
stage.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: The stage?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Wait. Falco?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hey there, Rickey! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Today's your lucky day! You're getting your very
own Special Falco Concert!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You seem a little lost lately, so I'm here to share
some motivation with you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Watch this show and get back some of that feng
shui power you love so much. ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hit it!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: This song...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Do the things you love to do!
Try out things you never knew! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
All it takes is a little feng shui
To brighten up everybody's days! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Keep runnin' and she'll get you Your feelings will get through, woohoo! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've never heard this song before, but it sounds
like she wrote it for Copano Rickey. Before I
know it, the music really picks up!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Go, Rickey! ♪ Go, Rickey! ♪ Go, go, Rickey! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Go, Rickey! ♪ Go, Rickey! ♪ Go, go, Rickey! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Go, Rickey! ♪ Go, Rickey! ♪ Go, go, Rickey! ♪
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Wowww! Falco... Did you write a whole song... just
for me?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Watching this performance... My heart feels so...
Why do I feel this way?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With each beat of the music and every smile on
Smart Falcon's face, Copano Rickey's heart is
lifted higher and higher.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is the power of Umadols—the power of Smart
Falcon's exceptional performance.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yayyy! ☆ Did you enjoy it, Rickey? Do you feel a
bit better?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I feel a lot better!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Great! I want to spread happiness with my
Umadol performances!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But, but! There are definitely other ways to make
people happy too. Not everyone likes music,
after all.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And for those people, there's the power of feng
shui! ☆ I'm sure there are people out there
waiting for the kind of encouragement only you
can offer.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Encouragement only I can offer...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! ♪ Even if you get a little bit lost, make sure
you keep on believing! Believe in yourself!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You'll be fine, Rickey! And you're on the right
track. I mean, it doesn't matter how you go about
it...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You truly want everyone to be happy! And that's
really wonderful. ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Oh, Falco!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I knew Smart Falcon would come through. She's
got the strength of a true idol—no, of an Umadol.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The weakened glimmer in Copano Rickey's eyes
burns bright again. It's as if the sealed qi within
has come pouring out.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Feng shui isn't wrong... Of course it's
not—it's what made me the happy person I am!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Learning about feng shui as a child made me so
happy. And it brought happiness to the many
people I introduced it to as well!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
As long as I don't give up, I'm sure I can keep the
circle of happiness going on and on forever!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! ♪ Well, it looks to me like you're good
to go. ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Thanks, Falco! Oh, and...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It was you, wasn't it, Trainer? You asked Falco for
her help, right?
choice_data_list: Yeah. I'm glad she made you feel a bit better.
Yeah. I'm glad she made you feel a bit better.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I'm more than a bit better! ♪ I'm so energized I
feel like I could fly!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's like the fog has lifted from my mind. Now I
know my only option is to be myself and go all in
on what's most important to me!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
All right! It's time to get serious again! Rickey! ☆
Lucky! ☆ We're so back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, with her incomparable support, the
Umadol Smart Falcon revitalizes Copano Rickey.
